arts.ttl: Shock for Newcastle as talisman open to Man City move in January
arts.sum: Newcastle have been below par in 2024/25 and that could explain why talisman, Bruno Guimaraes, is open to a move to Man City as early as January. The Brazilian has only recently signed a new long-term deal with the Magpies but was furious with the performance from his team-mates during the recent defeat against Brentford. […] The post Shock for Newcastle as talisman open to Man City move in January appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Leicester star finally gets job he wants despite van Nistelrooy's 'great luxury'
arts.sum: But handed his first start of the Premier League season by the interim coaching team, Coady has since played 90 minutes in new manager Ruud van Nistelrooy’s first two games. His lack of game-time with City saw him take on a role he’s more used to playing with England.

arts.ttl: I shushed Newcastle United diehards at just 16 but I was left raging at St James' Park
arts.sum: Not only did Sessegnon score two goals in the visitors' 3-1 win - boldly putting his finger to his lips after his second - the youngster also won his side a penalty at the death in the Championship clash. Shout out to Tim Ream, but he's a centre-back who wanted to take the penalty.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Newcastle facing difficulties as Liverpool swoop in for €60m-rated 21-year-old with 9 G/A in 21 games
arts.sum: Newcastle will be looking to strengthen their squad this winter but are facing difficulties in trying to land PSV’s brilliant right winger, Johan Bakayoko. According to CaughtOffside sources, the Magpies have been quietly tracking the 21-year-old for some time, however, Liverpool have now entered the picture and are believed to be in a better financial […] The post Exclusive: Newcastle facing difficulties as Liverpool swoop in for €60m-rated 21-year-old with 9 G/A in 21 games appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United predicted line-up vs Leicester with two big names back
arts.sum: Newcastle United predicted XI vs Leicester City: Dubravka, Livramento, Schar, Burn, Hall, Guimaraes, Tonali, Joelinton, Barnes, Gordon, Isak. Jacob Murphy did well against Liverpool and set up Alexander Isak's goal at Brentford, while Harvey Barnes got on the scoresheet and created several big chances last weekend.

arts.ttl: How to watch Newcastle vs Leicester - TV channel, live stream and kick-off time
arts.sum: Tom Bramall is today's referee, in what will be only his second Premier League fixture of the season, However, he has officiated at St James' Park before, and was in charge for last season's home win over Burnley and the 4-4 draw with Luton - as well as a 2-0 defeat at Crystal Palace. If we see the side which swamped Liverpool in the first half at the start of December, or beat Arsenal last month, then Eddie Howe should be confident of picking up three vital wins in the coming week.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe shares snippet of Newcastle United team talk ahead of Leicester clash
arts.sum: "We didn't know at Leeds that was going to be a turning point, but I felt the Burnley game was a big moment because we just needed to win. Eddie Howe will remind his players that they put in one of their best performances of 2024 just one game ago before they face Leicester City at St James' Park.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer refuses to sugarcoat Leicester feelings for former rival Ruud van Nistelrooy
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy agreed to become Leicester City's new head coach last month and the Manchester United favourite has been commended by Alan Shearer for taking on the challenge

arts.ttl: Man City target Wirtz & Guimaraes - Saturday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester City identify Florian Wirtz and Bruno Guimaraes as targets, Chelsea and Liverpool are interested in Milos Kerkez, and is Dusan Vlahovic heading to Arsenal in January?
